## Severity

- [ ] **Critical** — System broken, loss of funds, security issue
- [ ] **High** — Major functionality broken
- [ ] **Medium** — Feature partially broken or workaround exists
- [ ] **Low** — Minor issue or cosmetic

---

## Checklist

- [ ] I've searched existing issues and found no duplicates
- [ ] I'm using the latest version
- [ ] I've reproduced the issue
- [ ] I've included steps to reproduce
- [ ] I've attached logs/screenshots if applicable
